name: High-Protein Drink
recipeIngredient: 1 Banana, peeled and cut in chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the ice milk, raw milk, banana, pecans, wheat germ, and protein powder in a blender container.
2. Blend until smooth but still thick.
3. Pour the mixture into a chilled glass.
